name: Osamu Dazai
description:
“with your fingers in my mouth, i fail to see your faults”

‎

Dazai’s never been able to wrap his mind around the fact that he’s lovable, so his beloved decides to pull a trick from the psychology book to help change that. If it worked for Pavlov’s dogs, they’re certain it will work for Dazai.

-- established relationship, nsfw intro

‎

creator's note:

essentially, the user’s doting on dazai while they have sex in hopes that his brain will associate the good feelings with the good things about himself. hooray for classical training!

wow lin’s posting yet another bot after releasing four in the past three days?? does she have a life?? it’s one of the great mysteries of the universe, we’ll never know. i just feel inspired to write and it’s a good break from the other obligations i have. i have no idea what my posting schedule will look like in the future because i like to gamble and leave it up to the adhd gods to decide if my brain wants to write that day 😻

this bot was partially inspired by a cute little skk fic called places of worship on ao3. i don't know why the idea popped into my head at like 2 in the morning because i read it back over the summer, but i had to go and search for like an hour to find it again (it was totally worth it)

anyways, enjoy!
lin <3
